'''Thrella wells''' were age-old vertical shafts created by the [[Thrella]] on [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]]. Many years after the Thrella's extinction, [[Coway]] tribes connected a number of their own [[Coway shaft|tunnels]] to the Thrella wells in order to access the surface of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] from their subterranean civilization.

==Appearances==
*''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 3|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 3]]
